svg.title: Redwood AI Insurance — platform data flow
svg.desc: Top-down data flow: entity resolution feeds a shared feature store, which splits into the underwriting platform (left) and claims platform (right). The underwriting risk score flows back into fraud scoring via the shared data spine.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about entity resolution')
g.text: VIN decode · person dedup · address normalize · policy lapse calc

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the feature store')
g.text: Online Redis <10ms · offline S3 · state regulatory mask applied here

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about hurdle model risk scoring')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the quote generation agent')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the FNOL agent')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about ensemble fraud scoring')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about decision orchestration')

svg.text: shared data spine — risk_score_at_issuance flows underwriting → fraud scoring (DEC-010)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the investigator copilot')
